name: io.github.chdb-io/chdb-mcp
description: In-process OLAP for AI agents — query Parquet, CSV, JSON, pandas DataFrames, and remote ClickHouse with one tool. Powered by chDB.

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_WRITE
environment_variables.description: Set to 1 to allow INSERT/CREATE/DROP/ALTER (default: read-only).

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_MAX_RESULT_BYTES
environment_variables.description: Per-tool result cap in bytes (default: 1048576). Enforced engine-side via max_block_size + max_result_bytes + result_overflow_mode='break', then a final Python slice.

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SEC
environment_variables.description: Wall-clock cap per query in seconds (default: 30). Injected as chDB's max_execution_time. 0 disables.

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_FILE_ALLOWLIST
environment_variables.description: Colon-separated path prefixes. Opt-in filesystem isolation. When set, query_file() rejects paths outside the prefixes, and both query() and query_file() reject any table function not on the safe-by-construction list (file/url/s3/remote/executable/python/iceberg*/paimon*/...). When unset, no gating — the host process is trusted.

environment_variables.name: CHDB_MCP_SESSION_PATH
environment_variables.description: Directory for a persistent chDB session; if unset, session is in-memory.
